records.question: Of all the contestants who got voted, what is the contestant number and name of the contestant who got least votes?
records.gold_sql: SELECT T1.contestant_number , T1.contestant_name FROM contestants AS T1 JOIN votes AS T2 ON T1.contestant_number  =  T2.contestant_number GROUP BY T1.contestant_number ORDER BY count(*) ASC LIMIT 1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.contestant_number, c.contestant_name
FROM CONTESTANTS c
JOIN VOTES v ON c.contestant_number = v.contestant_number
GROUP BY c.contestant_number, c.contestant_name
ORDER BY COUNT(v.vote_id) ASC
LIMIT 1
trace: explore: no probe: Top-1 path confident or probing disabled

records.question: What is the area code in which the most voters voted?

records.question: Return the different names of cities that are in Asia and for which Chinese is the official language.

records.question: What are the names of properties that are either houses or apartments with more than 1 room?
records.gold_sql: SELECT property_name FROM Properties WHERE property_type_code  =  "House" UNION SELECT property_name FROM Properties WHERE property_type_code  =  "Apartment" AND room_count  >  1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT p.property_name
FROM Properties p
JOIN Ref_Property_Types rpt ON p.property_type_code = rpt.property_type_code
WHERE (rpt.property_type_description LIKE '%house%' OR rpt.property_type_description LIKE '%apartment%')
  AND p.room_count > 1
